hook: $27 organizer turned my disgusting cabinet into something I'm proud of.

aida_breakdown.attention: Overhead reveal shot of chaotic under-sink cabinet. Price hits immediately — $27 feels impossibly cheap for the result.
aida_breakdown.interest: Pan across expired products, tangled cords, damp cabinet floor. Owner admits they stopped opening it entirely.
aida_breakdown.desire: Organizer slides in with no tools. Pull-out drawers shown. Beauty shot of the finished tiered system.
aida_breakdown.action: Cabinet door closes on the organized interior. CTA overlay.

value_equation.dream_outcome: Under-sink cabinet looks like a magazine bathroom — every product has a place, tiers visible, clean floor
value_equation.perceived_likelihood: $27 shown next to real cabinet before/after — no staging, same bathroom, same products just organized
value_equation.effort_sacrifice: No tools, no drilling — slides directly onto existing cabinet posts, pull-out drawers included

scenes.visual_prompt: Overhead shot looking straight down into an open under-sink cabinet. Bottles tipped over, a tangled hair dryer cord, an expired cleaning spray, a damp paper towel on the floor. Chaotic and gross.
scenes.voiceover: A $27 organizer fixed my disgusting under-sink cabinet.

scenes.visual_prompt: Slow pan across the inside of the cabinet at floor level. Expired product labels visible. A bottle of something has left a sticky ring on the wood floor. Hair ties scattered. Universal bathroom chaos.
scenes.voiceover: Expired products. Tangled cords. Damp floor. Every bathroom.

scenes.visual_prompt: Hand reaches under the sink and a bottle immediately falls over, knocking into three others. Owner pulls hand back. Slightly darkly comic — a very familiar moment.
scenes.voiceover: I avoided opening it. That's how bad it got.

scenes.visual_prompt: Two-tier chrome organizer being slid into the under-sink cabinet. It fits cleanly around the pipe. Pull-out bottom drawer demonstrated with a smooth open-and-close. No tools anywhere in frame.
scenes.voiceover: This slides in under five minutes. No tools, no drilling.

scenes.visual_prompt: Beauty shot inside the finished cabinet. Top tier holds tall bottles standing upright. Pull-out bottom drawer holds smaller items sorted by type. Cabinet floor is clean. Soft bathroom lighting. Looks editorial.
scenes.voiceover: Everything has a home. I actually open this cabinet now.

scenes.visual_prompt: Cabinet door slowly swings closed. Last frame shows the clean closed cabinet under the sink — just a normal cabinet door, but the owner knows what's behind it. Satisfied hand-pat on the door.

caption:
$27 organizer turned my disgusting under-sink cabinet into something I'm actually proud of.

I used to avoid opening that cabinet. Expired products, tangled cords, bottles falling over every time I reached in. I thought everyone's bathroom looked like that.

This 2-tier organizer with pull-out drawers slid in around the pipe in under five minutes. No tools. No drilling. No measuring.

Now I open it just to look at it. That's where I'm at.

Spring cleaning win. Everything linked in bio.

#bathroomorganization #undersinkstorage #springcleaning #bathroomorganizer #homehacks

affiliate_strategy.primary_product: 2-tier adjustable under-sink cabinet organizer with pull-out drawers
